nasb.text: “You are no longer to give the people straw to make brick as previously; let them go and gather straw for themselves.

esv.text: “You shall no longer give the people straw to make bricks, as in the past; let them go and gather straw for themselves.

cnv.text: “你們不要像往日一樣再把草給人民做磚，叫他們自己去撿草。

ccb.text: “从今天开始，不许再供应草给他们制砖，叫他们自己去捡，
